Telemetry Link

Connect to a System Monitor server running on the same Wi-Fi network. Read-only — nothing here can change settings on that machine.

Where do I find this? Open the System Monitor app on the host computer — the address and key are shown right in its window.

First time on HTTPS? Open the server address above directly in a new tab once, click Advanced → Proceed to trust its certificate, then come back here and connect.
